build.buildCommand:
composer install --ignore-platform-reqs --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && mkdir -p data/cache data/log data/session public/docs-client/upload public/imgs-client/upload && chmod -R 755 data/cache data/log data/session public/docs-client/upload public/imgs-client/upload && cp config/init.php.dist config/init.php && cp public/.htaccess_original public/.htaccess && cat > config/autoload/local.php << 'EOF'
<?php
return [
    'db' => [
        'database' => getenv('DB_NAME') ?: 'railway',
        'username' => getenv('DB_USER') ?: 'root',
        'password' => getenv('DB_PASSWORD') ?: '',
        'hostname' => getenv('DB_HOST') ?: 'localhost',
        'port' => getenv('DB_PORT') ?: 3306,
    ],
    'mail' => [
        'type' => 'sendmail',
        'address' => 'info@bookings.example.com',
    ],
    'i18n' => [
        'locale' => 'en-US',
        'timezone' => 'Europe/Berlin',
    ],
];
EOF
